name: Cheescake Pancakes with Berry-Lemon Syrup
recipeIngredient: Complete Buttermilk pancake and waffle mix, 2 cups
Syrup ingredients for Berry-Lemon Syrup: 1 cup syrup, 1 cup raspberries or blueberries, optional strawberries, and 1/2 tsp shredded lemon peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the griddle.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the pancake mix, water, cottage cheese, sugar, and vanilla extract. Stir until well blended.
3. Pour batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the hot, well-greased griddle. Turn pancakes when tops are covered with bubbles and edges look dry. Turn only once.
Berry-Lemon Syrup:
1. Combine syrup ingredients in a small saucepan. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
2. Per serving (using fresh raspberries): 214 calories, 0.3 g protein, 0.2 g carbohydrate, 2.3 g fiber, and 8 mg sodium. No cholesterol.
